targets.rawSql:
SELECT 'Week ' || to_char(datum, 'IW') as "Week",
               COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum) = 2023 THEN mitarbeiter END) as "2023",
               COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum) = 2024 THEN mitarbeiter END) as "2024",
               COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum) = 2025 THEN mitarbeiter END) as "2025",
               COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum) = 2026 THEN mitarbeiter END) as "2026"
        FROM xl_projecttimes 
        WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
          AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
          AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu IN (${service:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new IN (${activity:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter IN (${employee:sqlstring}))
          AND ma_kat IS NOT NULL 
          AND ('${year:raw}' = '$__all' OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text IN (${year:sqlstring})) 
          AND ('${week:raw}' = '$__all' OR to_char(datum, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${ma_kat:raw}' = '$__all' OR ma_kat IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}))
        GROUP BY to_char(datum, 'IW') ORDER BY to_char(datum, 'IW')

SELECT to_char(datum, 'Mon') as "Month",
               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum) = 2023 THEN dauer ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 0) as "2023",
               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum) = 2024 THEN dauer ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 0) as "2024",
               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum) = 2025 THEN dauer ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 0) as "2025",
               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum) = 2026 THEN dauer ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 0) as "2026"
        FROM xl_projecttimes 
        WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
          AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
          AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu IN (${service:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new IN (${activity:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter IN (${employee:sqlstring}))
          AND ma_kat IS NOT NULL 
          AND ('${year:raw}' = '$__all' OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text IN (${year:sqlstring})) 
          AND ('${week:raw}' = '$__all' OR to_char(datum, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${ma_kat:raw}' = '$__all' OR ma_kat IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}))
        GROUP BY to_char(datum, 'Mon'), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM datum) ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM datum)

SELECT to_char(datum, 'IW') as "Week",
               EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text as "Year",
               COUNT(DISTINCT mitarbeiter) as "Count"
        FROM xl_projecttimes 
        WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
          AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
          AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu IN (${service:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new IN (${activity:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter IN (${employee:sqlstring}))
          AND ma_kat IS NOT NULL 
          AND ('${year:raw}' = '$__all' OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text IN (${year:sqlstring})) 
          AND ('${week:raw}' = '$__all' OR to_char(datum, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${ma_kat:raw}' = '$__all' OR ma_kat IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}))
        GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT to_char(datum, 'IW') as "Week",
               EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text as "Year",
               ROUND(SUM(dauer)::numeric, 0) as "Hours"
        FROM xl_projecttimes 
        WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
          AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
          AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu IN (${service:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new IN (${activity:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter IN (${employee:sqlstring}))
          AND ma_kat IS NOT NULL 
          AND ('${year:raw}' = '$__all' OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text IN (${year:sqlstring})) 
          AND ('${week:raw}' = '$__all' OR to_char(datum, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${ma_kat:raw}' = '$__all' OR ma_kat IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}))
        GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT to_char(datum, 'Mon') as "Month",
               EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text as "Year",
               ROUND(SUM(dauer)::numeric, 0) as "Hours"
        FROM xl_projecttimes 
        WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
          AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
          AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu IN (${service:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new IN (${activity:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter IN (${employee:sqlstring}))
          AND ma_kat IS NOT NULL 
          AND ('${year:raw}' = '$__all' OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text IN (${year:sqlstring})) 
          AND ('${week:raw}' = '$__all' OR to_char(datum, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${ma_kat:raw}' = '$__all' OR ma_kat IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}))
        GROUP BY 1, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM datum), 2 ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM datum), 2

SELECT mitarbeiter as "Employee",
               TO_CHAR(datum, 'Mon') as "Month",
               EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text as "Year",
               ROUND(SUM(dauer)::numeric, 2) as "Hours"
        FROM xl_projecttimes 
        WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
          AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
          AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu IN (${service:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new IN (${activity:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter IN (${employee:sqlstring}))
          AND ma_kat IS NOT NULL 
          AND ('${year:raw}' = '$__all' OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text IN (${year:sqlstring})) 
          AND ('${week:raw}' = '$__all' OR to_char(datum, 'IW') IN (${week:sqlstring}))
          AND ('${ma_kat:raw}' = '$__all' OR ma_kat IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}))
        GROUP BY 1, 2, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM datum), 3
        ORDER BY 1, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM datum), 3

list.name: year
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT jahr::text FROM xl_projecttimes ORDER BY 1 DESC

list.name: week
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT to_char(datum, 'IW') FROM xl_projecttimes ORDER BY 1 ASC

list.label: Service
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bereich_neu FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE bereich_neu IS NOT NULL ORDER BY bereich_neu

list.label: Activity
list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT task_new FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE task_new IS NOT NULL ORDER BY task_new

list.label: Employee
list.name: employee
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT mitarbeiter FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE mitarbeiter IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mitarbeiter
